introSection: Na Fianna Force is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Emerald Park in Ashbourne, County Meath, Ireland. Built by Vekoma, it opened in 2024 as part of the new Tír na nÓg area. The ride is intertwined with a Family Boomerang named Quest, which opened on the same day.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Following a legal battle, the park received planning permission to build this coaster in March 2021.

The ride opened on 22 May 2024.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Na Fianna Force on the park's website

fullText:
Na Fianna Force is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Emerald Park in Ashbourne, County Meath, Ireland. Built by Vekoma, it opened in 2024 as part of the new Tír na nÓg area. The ride is intertwined with a Family Boomerang named Quest, which opened on the same day.

Following a legal battle, the park received planning permission to build this coaster in March 2021.

The ride opened on 22 May 2024.




 * Na Fianna Force on the park's website
